hero.title: This is a workspace home for service operations, reference documents, and platform settings.

description.local: This home is the entry point for navigating the main work areas of the Service Desk portfolio. In Local Demo, you can review access limits and available actions based on Role (ADMIN, MANAGER, LEADER, USER, GUEST).
description.remote: This home is the entry point for navigating the main work areas of the Service Desk portfolio. In Remote mode, you can review permission flows closer to real service operations by combining Role with the user's relationship to each ticket.

about.title: About this home
about.description: This section explains the current runtime mode of the portfolio portal and the main navigation scope.

description.local: In Local Demo, you can explore the Service Desk flow, documents, and settings screens, while permission checks are simplified around Role-based rules.
description.remote: In Remote mode, the Service Desk flow, documents, and settings screens can be connected to real APIs, while permission behavior reflects both Role and user relationships.

local.note1: Protected routes are designed as internal portal screens after login, not as a public landing page.
local.note2: In Local Demo, menus and available actions change according to ADMIN, MANAGER, LEADER, USER, and GUEST roles.
local.note3: Organization-relationship permissions, ticket-relation restrictions, and remote API integration are separated so they can be validated more precisely in Remote mode.

remote.note1: Protected routes are designed as internal portal screens after login, not as a public landing page.
remote.note2: In Remote mode, access scope is determined by considering not only Role, but also relationships such as requester, assignee, and approver.
remote.note3: Ticket, document, approval, assignment, and settings data are connected through real API boundaries to provide a flow closer to an operational environment.

quickActions.title: Quick Actions
quickActions.description: Open the main work areas you are most likely to need right after sign-in.

serviceDesk.title: Service Desk
serviceDesk.description: Browse tickets, review queue status, and continue current work.

serviceDeskSetup.title: Service Desk Setup
serviceDeskSetup.description: Inspect categories, approval steps, and assignment rule structure.

workSummary.description: Lightweight operational context for the demo portal home.

authSessionFlow.title: Auth & Session Flow
authSessionFlow.description: Login experience, redirect handling, and protected shell behavior.

serviceDeskSettings.title: Service Desk Settings
serviceDeskSettings.description: Approval step, assignment rule, and category management surfaces.

documentsHub.description: Reference area for docs, notes, and future decision records.

currentFocus.title: Current Focus
currentFocus.description: A compact briefing panel for what this portal is emphasizing right now.
currentFocus.panelDescription: The home screen is intentionally scoped as an internal workspace entry point.

items.goal2: Balanced information density without dashboard overload
items.goal3: Easy replacement of mock summary content with real data later

nextIntegrations.title: Suggested next integrations
nextIntegrations.description: Connect the summary cards to ticket counts, approvals, and recent document activity once the protected home is ready to consume real workspace data.

resetDemo.title: Reset Demo
resetDemo.description: Reset local demo data and restore the initial mock data.
